summary.para: Defines whether the prefix length is appended to IP address keys in the response.
The IP address field to aggregation on. The field mapping type must be ip.
Defines whether the prefix applies to IPv6 addresses.
Minimum number of documents in a bucket for it to be included in the response.
Length of the network prefix. For IPv4 addresses the accepted range is [0, 32]. For IPv6 addresses the accepted range is [0, 128].
